changes: Rename the joystick scroller artifact stem from fa_ui_scroller to fa_joystick_scroller so the packaged and loose DLL filenames stop colliding conceptually with the nearby lane.
Rename the scroller catalog and package receipt filenames to joystick_scroller variants while preserving the deterministic Custom/Scripts package seam and the raw Custom/Plugins test seam split.
Advance the next undeployed dev package identity to FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.6.var so the next package-first build does not mutate the already-tested Dev.5 rung.
